signatureCarousel.name: La Parrillada
signatureCarousel.description: Mild Italian sausage, chimichurri shrimp, tender Carne Asada — served with 2 sides, grilled jalapeño, and fresh tortillas. Homemade, hearty, and perfect for sharing.

signatureCarousel.name: Pepián de Pollo
signatureCarousel.description: Guatemala's national dish — tender chicken simmered in a rich, thick sauce of roasted seeds, spices, and vegetables. Pure homemade comfort in every bite.

signatureCarousel.name: Costillas de Carnero
signatureCarousel.description: Juicy grilled lamb chops seasoned with traditional Guatemalan spices and served with fresh sides. A family favorite for special gatherings.

signatureCarousel.name: Shuco
signatureCarousel.description: The iconic Guatemalan hot dog — loaded sausage, guacamole, cabbage, and our signature sauces in a soft bun. Street-food classic done right at home.

weeklySpecials.name: Taco Tuesday
weeklySpecials.description: 4 tacos: carnitas, al pastor, pollo, or chorizo. Cabbage, cilantro, sautéed onions.

weeklySpecials.name: Empanada Wednesday
weeklySpecials.description: 4 empanadas: chicken, beef brisket, or chorizo & potato. Queso fresco, lettuce, sour cream, salsa ranchera.

weeklySpecials.name: Taquito Thursday
weeklySpecials.description: 4 crispy taquitos: chicken or beef brisket. Lettuce, queso fresco, sour cream, salsa ranchera.

weeklySpecials.name: Garnacha Friday
weeklySpecials.description: 4 homemade tortilla bowls: ground beef, ranchero sauce, queso fresco, cilantro + sour cream side.

items.name: Guacamole & Chips
items.description: Fresh, house-made guacamole with crispy tortilla chips.

items.name: Pico & Chips
items.description: Fresh pico de gallo with crispy tortilla chips on the side.

items.name: Bean Dip & Chips
items.description: Creamy refried bean dip served with warm tortilla chips.

items.name: Queso Dip
items.description: Warm, creamy melted cheese dip. Add chorizo +$3.

items.name: Enchilada
items.description: In-house tostada with refried beans, shredded carrots, cabbage, beets, chicken, queso fresco & crema.

items.name: Loaded Nachos
items.description: Golden chips topped with chorizo, black beans, lettuce, pico, guacamole, sour cream & pickled jalapeños. Choice of protein.

items.name: Tamales
items.description: La Trapana's banana-leaf wrapped chicken tamales with a base of corn or rice.

items.name: Enchiladas
items.description: Shredded chicken with corn base. Tamales wrapped in corn husk.

categories.name: Amanecer
categories.subtitle: Breakfast
categories.note: All breakfast plates come with refried beans, sweet plantains, queso fresco, and 5 handmade tortillas.

items.name: Huevos Rancheros
items.description: Two eggs any style over a tostada topped with homestyle ranchero sauce.

items.name: Huevos Revueltos
items.description: Two scrambled eggs.

items.name: Huevos con Chorizo
items.description: Two scrambled eggs mixed with chorizo.

items.name: Huevos con Salchicha
items.description: Two scrambled eggs with sausage slices.

items.name: Huevos Entomatados
items.description: Two scrambled eggs mixed with diced tomato, onion, and Guatemalan spice.

categories.name: Burritos y Más
categories.subtitle: Burritos, Tacos, Tortas & Quesadillas
categories.note: Choose your protein: Asada · Pollo · Carnitas · Barbacoa · Chorizo · Al Pastor · Veggies

items.name: Tacos
items.description: Topped with cabbage, cilantro, and caramelized onions on a homemade corn tortilla. Carne Asada +$3.

items.name: Burrito Bowls
items.description: Rice, beans, lettuce, mozzarella, pico de gallo & avocado. Carne Asada +$3.

items.name: Quesadillas
items.description: Flour tortilla stuffed with red & green peppers, onion, choice of protein & melted mozzarella.

items.name: Shuco
items.description: Grilled Guatemalan-style hot dog with avocado smash, tomato, onion, lime cabbage & savory sauces on a toasted bun. Side of fries. Mixto +$5.

items.name: Burrito
items.description: Stuffed with rice, beans, lettuce, cheese & pico. Served with house pickled jalapeños. Grilled Chicken +$2 / Carne Asada +$3.

items.name: Tortas
items.description: Toasted deli loaf with refried black beans, choice of protein, lettuce, queso fresco & avocado. Pickled jalapeños on side + a side.

items.name: Birria Tacos
items.description: Slow-braised tender beef birria with melted cheese in a warm crispy tortilla, topped with raw onions and cilantro. Served with rich consomé.

items.name: Birria Pizza
items.description: Loaded with melted mozzarella, stuffed with juicy beef birria, finished with cilantro & diced onions. Served with consomé and fresh limes.

items.name: Caldo de Res
items.description: Rich beef broth with hearty cut vegetables, red potatoes, chayote, carrot & cabbage. Served with rice, jalapeños, onions & homemade tortillas.

items.name: Caldo de Pollo
items.description: Chicken soup in rich broth with pasta, diced red potatoes, carrots, chayote & cilantro. Served with jalapeños, onions & homemade tortillas.

items.name: Chaomin de Pollo
items.description: Guatemalan-style chicken Lo Mein cooked with green & red peppers and carrots. Served with refried beans and 5 handmade tortillas.

items.name: Pepián de Pollo
items.description: Guatemala's national dish — chicken slow-cooked in a thick sauce of roasted tomatoes, peppers, spices & toasted seeds. Served with rice and tortillas.

items.name: Guisado de Res
items.description: Slow-roasted Guatemalan-style beef stew, served with potatoes, fresh rice, and 5 handmade tortillas.

items.name: Pollo Dorado
items.description: Two golden fried chicken legs, seasoned and cooked crispy outside, juicy inside. Served with two sides, salad and tortillas.

items.name: Mojarra Frita
items.description: Whole tilapia, seasoned, breaded and deep-fried until golden crispy outside, tender inside. Served with side salad, lime, two sides and tortillas.

categories.name: De la Parrilla
categories.subtitle: From the Grill
categories.note: All grill plates served with house salad, two sides and tortillas.

items.name: Pollo Asado
items.description: 6 oz. in-house cut chicken breast marinated in citrus herb blend.

items.name: Carne Asada
items.description: 6 oz. in-house cut and marinated skirt steak.

items.name: Costilla de Res
items.description: Tender Guatemalan-style grilled beef ribs marinated in traditional spices and slow-cooked over the grill for deep, smoky flavor.

items.name: La Parrillada
items.description: Traditional Guatemalan grill platter with tender carne asada, savory longaniza, and juicy grilled shrimp.

items.name: Costilla de Carnero
items.description: Tender bilbao lamb chops marinated with savory citrus mojo, grilled to perfection over an open flame.
